name: Data Pipeline
description: Pulls records from a REST API, cleans and transforms them, validates the result, loads it into a destination file or database, and produces a summary report.

form_fields.label: Source API URL
form_fields.description: REST endpoint to pull records from

form_fields.label: API Key
form_fields.description: Bearer token / API key, if the source requires auth

form_fields.label: Pagination Param
form_fields.description: Query param used to page through results (leave blank if none)

form_fields.label: Transform Rules
form_fields.placeholder: rename created->created_at; drop nulls; lowercase emails
form_fields.description: Plain-language description of the cleaning/transform rules

form_fields.label: Destination
form_fields.description: Where the transformed data should be loaded

form_fields.label: Destination Path
form_fields.description: File path (or DB path) for the loaded data

form_fields.label: Report Format
form_fields.description: Format for the final summary report

form_fields.label: Report Output Directory
form_fields.description: Directory where the final report will be saved

skills.name: Fetch Source Data
skills.description: Pull all records from the source API, handling pagination and auth.

skills.name: Clean And Transform
skills.description: Apply the transform rules to normalize, rename, and drop fields from the raw records.

skills.name: Validate Records
skills.description: Check the transformed records for required fields, types, and duplicates; quarantine bad rows.

skills.name: Load To Destination
skills.description: Write the valid records to the chosen destination (CSV/JSON file or SQLite DB).

skills.name: Generate Pipeline Report
skills.description: Summarize counts, rejects, and timing into a report in the chosen format and save it.
